generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring indoor ambient temperature as part of environmental conditions in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring indoor humidity levels for thermal comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring CO2 levels to assess indoor air quality and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for measuring light intensity to support visual comfort adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for detecting room occupancy for energy management and space utilization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration measurements for indoor air quality"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light intensity measurements for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data for space utilization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC systems based on digital twin-generated control signals"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting lighting intensity in response to visual comfort optimization"
]

instance WindowBlindController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for automated adjustment of window blinds to manage glare and solar gain"
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, BIMTool
]

instance MiddlewareMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware metadata for Eclipse Hono and Ditto integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building environmental and operational conditions for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureInsight, HumidityInsight, CO2Insight, IlluminanceInsight, OccupancyInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance under various scenarios for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption and occupant comfort based on historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionPredictionInsight, ComfortPredictionInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption through dynamic adjustments of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight, AdjustHVACSetpoint, AdjustLightingIntensity
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort through dynamic lighting and shading adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, AdjustBlindPosition
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building digital twin using Unreal Engine 5 for facility management decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ODTEEvaluationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Evaluation of digital twin interoperability and architectural soundness using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric"
    DTDFVocab:provides ODTEMetricInsight
]

instance ModelDrivenAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven automation for generating deployable DT artifacts from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides DTArtifactDeploymentInsight
]

instance TemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data for thermal comfort assessment"
]

instance HumidityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data for indoor air quality monitoring"
]

instance CO2Insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration data for health effect considerations"
]

instance IlluminanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Light intensity data for visual comfort evaluation"
]

instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data for space utilization analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption based on real-time sensor data"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adjustments to lighting and shading for optimal visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights related to non-visual health effects from environmental conditions"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from building performance simulations for scenario analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy consumption trends for proactive management"
]

instance ComfortPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal and visual comfort levels based on model simulations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building data for decision support"
]

instance ODTEMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric for assessing DT quality and interoperability"
]

instance DTArtifactDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployment of digital twin artifacts through model-driven automation"
]

instance AdjustHVACSetpoint : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC setpoints based on energy optimization results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingIntensity : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of lighting intensity to maintain visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustBlindPosition : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of window blinds to manage glare and solar gain"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for creating and maintaining building geometry and spatial models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenAutomationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automated artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenAutomationService, ODTEEvaluationService
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure environment including sensors, actuators, and BIM components"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, IlluminanceSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, WindowBlindController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT and sent to physical actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to adjust Building Control Systems (BCS) operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for live operational updates and immediate response to physical system changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular, service-oriented architecture with a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, standardized extension points for service integration, and coordinated roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases of the building life cycle, with the DT encompassing all stages from initial modeling to ongoing operational optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural consistency between the digital twin and physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, leveraging IoT protocols such as MQTT and AMQP for secure and scalable communication between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic modeling and Eclipse Hono/Ditto standards for IoT and digital twin data exchange, addressing fragmented integration through standardized extension points."
]
